name: Pit Trap
entries: A simple pit dug in the ground, covered by a large cloth anchored on the pit's edge and camouflaged with dirt and debris.

variants.name: Hidden Pit
entries: The pit's cover is hidden. A {@dc 15} Wisdom (Perception) check spots it.

variants.name: Spiked Pit
entries: Sharpened spikes line the bottom: {@damage 2d10} piercing damage on a fall.
